calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Roger Marcia, the moving party.
Respondent, Juan Carlos Cuellar, the opposing party.
Interpreter for both parties, Pilar Espinoza (330288), translates from Spanish to English and English to Spanish.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent, Juan Carlos Cuellar, testified on behalf of himself.
Defendant/Appellant, Roger Marcia, testified on behalf of himself.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Brian Stretch; Clerk: C. Balanga; Not Reported. (D210)
